Captain Sarah Johnson.profile_text: Captain Sarah Johnson is a protagonist. Personality traits: determined, resourceful, responsible. Voice and speech style: professional and authoritative.

Dr. Leo Chen.profile_text: Dr. Leo Chen is a antagonist. Personality traits: ambitious, selfish, deceitful. Voice and speech style: confident and condescending.

Liam.profile_text: Liam is a supporting character. Personality traits: loyal, intelligent, inquisitive. Voice and speech style: quirky and quick-witted.
